title: 10 best herbal teas for alzheimer’s disease
description: Avena sativa teas helps with Alzheimer's disease because it contains compounds that support brain health and may slow cognitive decline. The herb's antioxidant properties help protect against oxidative stress, a known contributor to neurodegenerative diseases. Avena sativa also contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which may help improve memory and cognitive function by enhancing blood flow to the brain and promoting the growth of new neurons.
